notes: All 12 unresolved issues from the merge script are now resolved.

Added 7 missing file nodes: TraceIdUtil.java, RequestLogAspect.java, SysUser.java, SysUserRepository.java, AuthService.java, SysUserService.java, AuthServiceTest.java — all were in batch assignments but the LLM did not emit them.
Added 2 missing function nodes: ObjectResult.of and ListResult.of (static factory methods called by Result.okObj/okList).
Restored 5 dropped edges from AuthController: 3 imports to service files (SysUser, AuthService, SysUserService) and 2 calls (login->AuthService, info->SysUserService).
Restored 2 dropped calls edges: Result.okObj -> ObjectResult.of and Result.okList -> ListResult.of.
Restored 4 dropped contains edges: docker-compose.yml contains mysql/redis/nacos/adminer. The original edges had source prefix 'file:' but the node is typed 'service:'.
Restored 1 dropped configures edge: jvm.config -> java-admin-api/pom.xml. The original edge had target prefix 'file:' but the node is typed 'config:'.
Added 13 cross-batch imports edges: 11 from importMap (previously not emitted by any single batch) + 2 TraceId imports (TraceIdFilter/TraceIdFilterTest -> TraceIdUtil, whose target was missing).
Cross-batch edge coverage: 43/43 = 100% of importMap edges with both endpoints in the graph are now present.

The importMap contains 145 additional edges referencing files NOT in the graph (almost all under apps/react-admin/, which was not scanned/filtered). The scan-result.json only includes 124 files and excludes apps/react-admin/ entirely.
70 import edges exist in the graph that are NOT in the importMap — these were captured by the LLM via static analysis (auto-imports, Java implicit deps) and reflect the graph's superset of info.

Final graph: 262 nodes (89 file, 60 function, 28 class, 25 config, 24 table, 23 endpoint, 8 document, 5 service) and 419 edges (113 imports, 137 contains, 48 exports, 30 calls, 22 depends_on, 22 configures, 14 related, 13 documents, 11 tested_by, 4 inherits, 3 migrates, 1 provisions, 1 deploys).
